name: MCC950
note: CRID3/MCC950 (Coll et al. Nat Med 2015; ChEMBL 5090362) — diarylsulfonylurea, terminated in phase II due to hepatotoxicity

name: CY-09
note: CY-09 (Jiang et al. JEM 2017; ChEMBL 4794388) — direct NLRP3 inhibitor targeting ATPase site

name: OLT1177
note: Dapansutrile/OLT1177 (Marchetti et al. PNAS 2018; ChEMBL 4297547) — β-sulfonyl nitrile, phase III

name: Oridonin
note: Oridonin (He et al. Nat Commun 2018; ChEMBL 472143) — covalent NLRP3 inhibitor, natural product

name: Tranilast
note: Tranilast (Huang et al. EMBO Mol Med 2018; ChEMBL 491) — direct NLRP3 inhibitor, N-aroylanthranilate
